'''jadufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squaddy|squaddy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squaddy|squaddy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jadufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædifith|jædifith]] || [[word:jædifij|jædifij]] || [[word:jædifish|jædifish]] || [[word:jædifi|jædifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadudufuth|jadudufuth]] || [[word:jadudufuj|jadudufuj]] || [[word:jadudufush|jadudufush]] || [[word:jadudufu|jadudufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadufuth|jadufuth]] || [[word:jadufuj|jadufuj]] || [[word:jadufush|jadufush]] || [[word:jadufu|jadufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jaduffuth|jaduffuth]] || [[word:jaduffuj|jaduffuj]] || [[word:jaduffush|jaduffush]] || [[word:jaduffuf|jaduffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadufuthu|jadufuthu]] || [[word:jadufuju|jadufuju]] || [[word:jadufushu|jadufushu]] || [[word:jadufuku|jadufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadufuth|jadufuth]] || [[word:jadufuj|jadufuj]] || [[word:jadufush|jadufush]] || [[word:jadufu|jadufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadufuthul|jadufuthul]] || [[word:jadufujul|jadufujul]] || [[word:jadufushul|jadufushul]] || [[word:jadufukul|jadufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadufuthuthu|jadufuthuthu]] || [[word:jadufujuju|jadufujuju]] || [[word:jadufushushu|jadufushushu]] || [[word:jadufuku|jadufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadufuthun|jadufuthun]] || [[word:jadufujun|jadufujun]] || [[word:jadufushun|jadufushun]] || [[word:jadufukun|jadufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadufuthuoro|jadufuthuoro]] || [[word:jadufujuoro|jadufujuoro]] || [[word:jadufushuoro|jadufushuoro]] || [[word:jadufukuoro|jadufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
